text: You have three hours (plus any pre-agreed individual adjustment) to complete the paper.
Answer four essay questions, TWO from Section A and TWO from Section B.
Each essay question carries the same number of marks.
Candidates are advised to devote equal time to each question.

This is a closed book exam.
Candidates should not copy and paste images from any other documents.
Where appropriate (e.g. for formulae, equations, or diagrams) you may hand write or draw on the Inspera paper provided.

sub-instructions: ⓘ Answer TWO questions from SECTION A and TWO questions from SECTION B.
content: What bonds stabilize alpha-helices and beta-sheets and what is the consequence of these bonds for protein structure?
